tweets.name: Venture Twins

Side note - it's never a dull day in the AI creative community 😂

The Phota team never claimed to have pretrained a base image model from scratch.

But they did train a killer identity model + made an incredible product.

I'd highly recommend checking it out if you haven't yet!

tweets.name: Venture Twins
tweets.text:
Today's best AI products are often layered systems of models working together to achieve a goal.

This is how Phota was built - a proprietary identity model partners with base image models to NAIL photos of people & pets.
